summary_one_line: Inputs must carry valid multi-entry chunk structures (text/sPLT/unknown) so png_free_data is invoked with a per-item num != -1.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A PNG with valid chunk-type and length/CRC fields whose comparisons against libpng's expected literals pass, so deeper chunk-parsing populates info_ptr arrays and png_free_data is later reached with num != -1.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner cmplog seeds carry intact chunk headers (PNG/IHDR/gAMA/sRGB at fixed offsets) and the winner-only coverage reaches per-chunk free paths (tRNS 508, eXIf 621, hIST 641, PLTE 650) that the loser never enters, indicating more chunks parsed to valid state.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser naive seeds corrupt the chunk-type / length / CRC region (e.g. offsets 0x1d-0x1e, 0x2c-0x3d differ with no concentration toward the valid literals), so those chunk comparisons fail and the per-item free branches stay un-hit (loser L=0 on the blocker true side).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads intercepted integer/string CMP operands from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the expected chunk-type/CRC literal directly into the matching input offset, letting cmplog clear the chunk-validation comparisons that naive must hit by chance; verified by an I2S-floor dash-row ancestor in the winner lineage.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A PNG whose chunk-validation comparison operands are driven progressively closer to the expected values, so chunk parsing succeeds and png_free_data is reached with a per-item num != -1.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in all 10 trials and accumulates a positive hitcount (avg=77) on the blocker, reaching the same per-chunk free paths; CMP_MAP distance buckets reward inputs whose chunk-field comparisons get nearer to matching, steering toward valid chunk structures.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive has no CMP_MAP feedback, so its corrupted chunk fields (divergent, unconcentrated bytes at the chunk-type/length offsets) provide no gradient and it stays blocked (loser=0/10, blocked 24.00h).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per CMP; an input whose chunk-field comparison is closer to matching adds a new bucket and is preserved, giving a hill-climbing gradient toward valid chunks that plain edge coverage (naive) lacks.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true branch of if (num != -1) at png.c:674 inside png_free_data, globally blocked on side T.
cmplog wins over naive with full divergence at this branch via the I2S technique delta.
value_profile wins over naive with full divergence at this branch via the value_profile technique delta.
Winner-only coverage enters per-chunk free paths (tRNS/eXIf/hIST/PLTE) that the loser never reaches, evidencing deeper chunk parsing.
Winner seeds carry intact PNG/IHDR/gAMA/sRGB chunk headers.
Loser-blocking seeds differ from winners at chunk-field offsets with no concentration toward the valid literals.
The loser is blocked on the true side for the full campaign while the winner resolves it.
value_profile accumulates a positive hitcount on the branch while the loser stays at zero.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=77  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which scans the input for a CMP operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile feedback preserves inputs whose CMP operands are closer to matching than previously seen, creating a gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3818 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 013b9f2a08a04135` and `--seed 074cbf90cbbef94f`; both winner chains contain an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 6 (shared ancestor 94c47bff5687a0c9), the lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness in which all chunk-validation comparisons are removed (chunks accepted unconditionally) but the num != -1 branch still resolved far more often under cmplog/value_profile than naive — showing the divergence is not driven by comparison-gated chunk parsing.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact offsets whose comparisons gate reaching num != -1 are inferred from the per-role coverage and PNG chunk layout, not pinned to a single concentrated I2S-substitutable byte run in the BYTE DIFF (all rows are PARTIAL).
